title: Self-awareness answers are stale
evidence: Pi described evolution.jsonl as empty, tickets as empty, no monthly review — all wrong. Answered from consciousness.txt knowledge instead of live file reads.
root_cause: system_introspect tool did not exist. Pi had no mechanism to read live system state at query time.
fix_code: Added _system_introspect(agent) to agent/tools.py reading: evolution.jsonl line count, tickets/open/ and tickets/closed/ glob counts, SOLUTIONS.jsonl line count + last entry ID, SQLite l3_cache row count, agent.session_id/mode/uptime. Added schema to get_tool_definitions() (no required inputs). Added elif dispatch in execute_tool(). Split try/except into two independent blocks so a timezone-naive timestamp in older logs cannot reset total_interactions to None.
fix_prompt: None — this is a tool gap, not a prompt gap.
test: testing/test_system_introspect.py — 7 tests, all offline, all pass
